entries.name: AU-Mid
entries.label: Australia Mid (915.075 MHz)
entries.description: Australian MeshCore Mid preset. 915.075 MHz below the LoRaWAN AU915 band. Most common AU community preset (Brisbane/SEQ MBUG, national Discord).
entries.notes: AU LIPD class licence: 915-928 MHz, 1W EIRP max (30 dBm). 22 dBm conducted + 8 dBi antenna = 30 dBm EIRP. sync_word 13380 = 0x3444 MeshCore public network.

entries.name: AU-Narrow
entries.label: Australia Narrow (923.125 MHz)
entries.description: Australian MeshCore Narrow preset. 62.5 kHz bandwidth on the SX1261 Channel E radio. Used for Narrow-band bridging.
entries.notes: Requires Channel E (SX1261). Verify frequency with your local AU community before deploying.

entries.name: AU-Wide
entries.label: Australia Wide (915.8 MHz)
entries.description: Australian MeshCore Wide preset. 250 kHz bandwidth for high-throughput links at shorter range.
entries.notes: Verify frequency and SF with your local AU community before deploying.

entries.name: EU-868
entries.label: Europe 868 MHz (EU868)
entries.description: European MeshCore standard preset. 869.462 MHz in the EU863-870 ISM band.
entries.notes: EU duty cycle limit applies. Max 1% per channel (36s/hour). TX power 14 dBm typical for ETSI compliance.

entries.name: EU-Narrow
entries.label: Europe Narrow (869.618 MHz)
entries.description: European MeshCore Narrow preset. 62.5 kHz bandwidth for Channel E (SX1261).
entries.notes: Requires Channel E (SX1261). EU duty cycle limit applies.
